title: Teaching an LLM to Speak Vestaboard Note: Building Vestaboard AI
abstract: This time, we're giving the mighty LLM a new twist—Vestaboard AI! Imagine a linguistic giant suddenly mastering down-to-earth conversation. It's more than just an upgrade; it transforms how you and I connect into something lively and engaging. Ready for some stories and jokes? Join us in this language revolution!
abstract_zh: 这回咱们要给大名鼎鼎的LLM安个新行头——Vestaboard AI！想象一下，一个原本只会书面语的大佬，突然学会了用最接地气的语言和你聊天。这不是普通的技能升级，而是让你我之间的交流瞬间变得生动有趣！准备好听故事、讲笑话了吗？快来加入这场语言革命吧！
